behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the exact expected output strings '(a, /, *, x, y) -> None' and '(p, q, /, *, k) -> None', references the loop pattern 'for parameter in parameters', and the methods is_positional_only()/is_keyword_only(). AGENTS.md rules are cited with line numbers.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug (keyword-only check happens too early) but doesn't give the exact code change; agent must figure out how to reorder.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_display_ordering_structure asserts the literal substring 'parameter.is_positional_only()' must appear before 'parameter.is_keyword_only()' in the loop; an alternative fix that uses different method names, restructures with match, or hoists the star emission outside this exact pattern would fail despite producing correct output.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cargo check/clippy/fmt/test as subprocesses to actually exercise the behavior via snapshot assertions.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_slash_star_display injects real snapshot assertions that require the actual output strings; a stub couldn't satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Both example outputs from instruction.md are asserted as snapshots, plus AGENTS.md rules are checked.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers (Gates, Repo CI/CD, Fail-to-pass, Config-derived) and named clearly.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the conceptual area (display loop, methods) but not exact line numbers or file paths; localization is implicit but reasonable.
